preferred_name: High/single pressure side operating conditions for device design

preferred_name_ml.en: High/single pressure side operating conditions for device design
preferred_name_ml.fr: Conditions opératoires du côté pression unique/élevée pour conception d'appareil

definition: properties characterizing the nominal conditions for the design of pressure devices at a pressure measurement point or the high pressure part of a differential pressure measurement point

definition_ml.en: properties characterizing the nominal conditions for the design of pressure devices at a pressure measurement point or the high pressure part of a differential pressure measurement point
definition_ml.fr: propriétés caractérisant les conditions nominales pour la conception d'appareils de pression en un point de mesure de pression ou la partie haute pression d'un point de mesure de pression différentielle
definition_ml.de: Merkmale, die die Nennbedingungen für die Auslegung von Druckgeräten an einem Druckmesspunkt oder an der Hochdruckseite eines Differenzdruckmesspunkts kennzeichnen
